texto: You don't know how many celebrities I've gone into recording sessions with who first are kind of weirded out by us freaky voiceover people, then when the day is over, they want to stay. They haven't had that much fun acting in ages. It's hard to have any attitude about it.
explicacao: Citação de Jeff Bennett sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You don't know how many celebrities I've gone into recording sessions with who first are kind of …” articula reflexao, day, fun em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como fun e people.
